option.shield-counter.enable_fall_shield: Allows an actively raised shield to reduce fall damage.
option.shield-counter.fall_damage_reduct: Fraction of fall damage prevented. 0.5 means 50%.
option.shield-counter.durability_cost_mu: Multiplies shield durability loss based on prevented damage. 0 disables durability loss.
option.shield-counter.require_shield_rai: Requires the shield to be raised for a minimum time before reducing fall damage.
option.shield-counter.min_shield_raise_t: Minimum active shield-use time. 20 ticks equals 1 second.
option.shield-counter.enable_shield_char: Accumulates charge while actively using a shield.
option.shield-counter.max_shield_charge_: Maximum stored shield charge. 20 ticks equals 1 second.
option.shield-counter.charge_stage_two_t: Charge required to enter stage 2. It is corrected to remain above stage 1.
option.shield-counter.charge_stage_three: Charge required for full charge. It cannot exceed the maximum charge.
option.shield-counter.enable_shield_char: Prevents shield charge from rebuilding briefly after a full-charge shield counter.
option.shield-counter.shield_charge_cool: Cooldown ticks after Shield Counter I consumes full shield charge.
Cooldown ticks after Shield Counter II consumes full shield charge.
Cooldown ticks after Shield Counter III consumes full shield charge.
option.shield-counter.show_shield_charge: Shows an action-bar message when the shield reaches full charge.
option.shield-counter.enable_shield_char: Display a charge progress bar below the crosshair while holding a shield.
option.shield-counter.shield_charge_hud_: Pixels to offset the progress bar below the crosshair.
Width of the progress bar in pixels.
Height of the progress bar in pixels.
option.shield-counter.enable_shield_coun: Allows the Shield Counter enchantment to reflect successfully blocked entity attacks.
option.shield-counter.consume_charge_on_: Clears the current shield charge after Shield Counter triggers.
option.shield-counter.counter_durability: Scales vanilla shield durability loss for a Shield Counter block. 0 disables the loss and 1 keeps the vanilla value.
option.shield-counter.counter_level1_bas: Uncharged reflected damage ratio for Shield Counter I.
option.shield-counter.counter_level2_bas: Uncharged reflected damage ratio for Shield Counter II.
option.shield-counter.counter_level3_bas: Shield Counter III always reflects 100% damage; saved configs are corrected to 1.0.
option.shield-counter.counter_knockback_: Knockback strength for an uncharged Shield Counter III.
Shield Counter III Full Charge Knockback
Knockback strength for a fully charged Shield Counter III.
death.attack.shield_reflect: %1$s was killed by their own reflected attack
